title: geox_claim_challenge (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `geox_claim_challenge`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing geox schema for `geox_claim_challenge` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Challenge the symbol without attacking the person's maruah — critical for PETRONAS-style subsurface work.

challenge_symbolic_target.description: §3.H — Social systems collapse when one symbol becomes unquestioned truth.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every geox_claim_challenge output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
